note: Clinical terminology normalization dictionary for MedMe (docs/015 §3.5). Codes pulled from the local OMOP vocab (LOINC / RxNorm / ATC + OMOP standard concept_id). Conversions are affine: canonical_value = slope * source_value + intercept. LOINC property/scale is chosen to agree with canonical_unit (molar LOINC for SI molar canonicals). See docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-terminology-normalization-layer-design.md.

entries.note: LOINC 33914-3 is the MDRD-formula eGFR; its OMOP concept (3030354) is non-standard (blank standard_concept) — OMOP has no clean standard eGFR measurement concept, so this is the best available and a deliberate deviation from the standard_concept='S' rule.

Canonical is molar urea (mmol/L, LOINC 22664-7). The mg/dL row assumes the source is BUN (urea nitrogen, as N): factor 0.357 = 10/28.014. This is correct for US labs reporting BUN in mg/dL (the near-universal mg/dL convention). Do NOT apply it to a value reporting urea mass in mg/dL (MW 60.06 → ×0.1665).

Generic serum/plasma glucose (LOINC 14749-6, Moles/volume). Fasting-specific aliases (空腹血糖/FPG/FBG) also map here in V1 — the fasting-vs-random distinction is not preserved. If that distinction is needed later, split to fasting LOINC 14771-0 (concept 3018251).

aliases: 天门冬氨酸氨基转移酶

entries.note: Potassium is monovalent, so mEq/L is numerically identical to mmol/L (slope 1).
Sodium is monovalent, so mEq/L equals mmol/L (slope 1).
Chloride is monovalent, so mEq/L equals mmol/L (slope 1).

Total calcium (LOINC 2000-8, Moles/volume). mg/dL->mmol/L factor 0.2495 = 10/40.078 (Ca MW). Alias uses 血钙/Ca/Ca2+ and NOT bare 'CA' to avoid collision with tumor markers CA-125/CA19-9 (which always carry their number). Ionized calcium is a distinct analyte and is intentionally not mapped here.
Serum inorganic phosphate (LOINC 14879-1, Moles/volume). mg/dL->mmol/L factor 0.3229 = 10/30.974 assumes the source reports elemental phosphorus (P), the near-universal mg/dL convention.
Serum magnesium (LOINC 2601-3, Moles/volume). mg/dL->mmol/L factor 0.4114 = 10/24.305 (Mg MW).

Mapped to Bicarbonate [Moles/volume] (LOINC 1963-8). Chinese chemistry panels labelled 二氧化碳结合力/CO2-CP/二氧化碳 measure total CO2 (bicarbonate + dissolved CO2), which is LOINC 2028-9 (Carbon dioxide, total, concept 3015632); both are reported in mmol/L and are clinically used interchangeably, so they fold to this entry. This is a venous chemistry measure, distinct from arterial blood-gas pCO2.

aliases: 半胱氨酸蛋白酶抑制剂C

entries.note: Spot-urine microalbumin (LOINC 14957-5, Mass/volume). Specimen is urine, kept distinct from serum 白蛋白/ALB (albumin) so the two never collapse.

Spot-urine microalbumin/creatinine ratio (LOINC 14959-1, Mass Ratio, mg/g). Some Chinese labs report ACR in mg/mmol against a distinct molar-ratio LOINC (Albumin/Creatinine [Molar ratio] 14585-4); that is a different unit basis and is intentionally NOT cross-converted here (no affine factor supplied) to avoid error.
Direct (conjugated) bilirubin (LOINC 14629-0, Moles/volume). mg/dL->umol/L factor 17.1 (bilirubin MW 584.66), same basis as total bilirubin.
Indirect (unconjugated) bilirubin (LOINC 14630-8, Moles/volume). mg/dL->umol/L factor 17.1 (bilirubin MW 584.66).
Serum globulin (LOINC 2336-6, specimen 'Serum'). Abbreviation GLB is kept distinct from glucose GLU; bare 'GL' is intentionally not added.

Albumin/Globulin ratio (LOINC 1759-0, Mass Ratio) — dimensionless. canonical_unit is the UCUM unity unit '1' with an identity conversion row (no unit conversion applies); it is a computed ratio, not a concentration.
Canonical is percent (e.g. 45 %). Analyzers/feeds that report HCT as a volume fraction (e.g. 0.45 L/L) use the L/L row (×100). Both express the same volume fraction; no method assumption.

entries.canonical_name: 平均红细胞血红蛋白量
aliases: 平均红细胞血红蛋白量
红细胞平均血红蛋白量

entries.canonical_name: 平均红细胞血红蛋白浓度
aliases: 平均红细胞血红蛋白浓度
红细胞平均血红蛋白浓度

entries.note: This is RDW-CV (coefficient of variation, reported in %). RDW-SD (standard deviation, reported in fL, LOINC 21000-5) is a different measurand and is NOT this entry — do not map RDW-SD here.
Absolute neutrophil count (ANC), distinct from the percentage entry neut_pct (770-8). The '#' aliases are kept qualified so they never collide with the '%' aliases of neut_pct.
Method-agnostic ESR (LOINC 30341-2). Chinese labs are predominantly Westergren (LOINC 4537-7, concept 3013707); values are read in mm/h regardless of method, so no conversion is needed.
INR is a dimensionless ratio (PT patient/PT normal, ISI-corrected). Canonical unit '1' (UCUM unity) with an identity row; there is no cross-unit conversion.

entries.canonical_name: 活化部分凝血活酶时间
aliases: 活化部分凝血活酶时间

entries.note: Canonical is FEU (fibrinogen-equivalent units), mg/L, LOINC 48065-7. The ug/mL (=mg/L numerically) and ng/mL (÷1000) rows are pure mass-unit scaling that ASSUME the source is also FEU. Do NOT convert between FEU and DDU (D-dimer units): FEU ≈ 2 × DDU is assay-dependent and not a fixed factor — a DDU-reported result must be treated as a different quantity, not scaled into this entry.

entries.canonical_name: 游离三碘甲状腺原氨酸
aliases: 游离三碘甲状腺原氨酸
entries.note: 游离三碘甲状腺原氨酸(free T3)。规范单位 pmol/L(molar,LOINC 14928-6 [Moles/volume])。部分实验室以质量单位 pg/mL 报告(FT3 分子量≈651);质量↔摩尔换算随分析方法而异,不作自动换算。区别于总T3(键 t3)。

aliases: 游离四碘甲状腺原氨酸
entries.note: 游离甲状腺素(free T4)。规范单位 pmol/L(molar,LOINC 14920-3 [Moles/volume])。部分实验室以质量单位 ng/dL 报告(FT4 分子量≈777);不作自动换算。区别于总T4(键 t4)。
总三碘甲状腺原氨酸(total T3)。规范单位 nmol/L(molar,LOINC 14930-2 [Moles/volume])。部分实验室以质量单位 ng/mL 报告;不作自动换算。区别于游离T3(键 ft3)。
总甲状腺素(total T4)。规范单位 nmol/L(molar,LOINC 14921-1 [Moles/volume])。部分实验室以质量单位 µg/dL 报告;不作自动换算。区别于游离T4(键 ft4)。

entries.canonical_name: 甲状腺过氧化物酶抗体
aliases: 甲状腺过氧化物酶抗体
抗甲状腺过氧化物酶抗体
entries.note: 甲状腺过氧化物酶抗体(anti-TPO / TPOAb)。IU/mL 与 kIU/L 数值等同(1 IU/mL = 1 kIU/L)。
甲状腺球蛋白抗体(anti-Tg / TgAb)。刻意不使用裸缩写 'TG'/'Tg' 作别名——它与甘油三酯(triglycerides)的别名 'TG' 归一化后冲突。IU/mL 与 kIU/L 数值等同。
胰岛素(检测项,非药物)。规范单位 µIU/mL(UCUM u[IU]/mL);µIU/mL = mIU/L 数值等同。部分实验室以摩尔单位 pmol/L 报告(约 1 µIU/mL ≈ 6.0 pmol/L,但随标准品/方法而异),不作自动换算。空腹胰岛素别名在 V1 归此通用项。
C肽(connecting peptide)。规范单位 ng/mL(= µg/L)。nmol/L 摩尔单位换算基于 C肽分子量 3020.29:1 nmol/L = 3.020 ng/mL(即 1 ng/mL = 0.331 nmol/L)。
餐后2小时血糖(2-hour postprandial glucose,LOINC 14761-1 --2 hours post meal,molar)。与空腹/随机血糖(键 glucose)为独立项,故不使用裸别名 '血糖'/'葡萄糖'/'GLU' 以免冲突。OGTT 服糖后2小时血糖(post-75 g,LOINC 14995-5 / concept 3017538)为相关但不同的概念。

aliases: 氨基末端B型钠尿肽前体
entries.note: 氨基末端脑钠肽前体(NT-proBNP)。pg/mL = ng/L 数值等同。极少数以 pmol/L 报告,方法学相关,不作自动换算。与 BNP(键 bnp)为不同分析物。
脑钠肽(BNP)。pg/mL = ng/L 数值等同。与 NT-proBNP(键 nt_probnp)为不同分析物,数值不可互换。
超敏C反应蛋白(hs-CRP,LOINC 30522-7 高敏方法)。与常规 CRP(键 crp)为不同 LOINC/方法(高敏用于心血管风险分层),刻意分开;别名不含裸 'CRP'。mg/dL → mg/L 系数 10。
C反应蛋白(常规 CRP,LOINC 1988-5)。与超敏 hs-CRP(键 hscrp)为不同 LOINC/方法,刻意分开。mg/dL → mg/L 系数 10。
同型半胱氨酸(Hcy)。规范单位 µmol/L(molar,LOINC 13965-9)。质量单位 mg/L 在临床罕用(分子量 135.18),未列换算行。
肌酸激酶总活性(CK / CPK,catalytic activity)。与同工酶 CK-MB(键 ckmb)为不同项,别名不含 'MB'。
肌酸激酶 MB 同工酶。规范单位取活性 U/L(LOINC 32673-6 [catalytic activity],中国以活性法为主)。另有质量法 CK-MB mass(ng/mL,LOINC 13969-1 / concept 3005785):活性与质量为不同检测,数值不可互换,故未列换算行。
乳酸脱氢酶总活性(LDH,catalytic activity)。
心肌肌钙蛋白I(cTnI)。规范单位 ng/mL(= µg/L)。高敏 hs-cTnI 常以 ng/L 报告(1 ng/mL = 1000 ng/L);因方法/单位标注常不可靠,刻意不列 ng/L 自动换算,使用前须核对单位与方法。仅用限定别名(不含裸 '肌钙蛋白')以免与 cTnT 混淆。
心肌肌钙蛋白T(cTnT)。规范单位 ng/mL(= µg/L)。高敏 hs-cTnT 常以 ng/L 报告(1 ng/mL = 1000 ng/L);刻意不列 ng/L 自动换算,使用前须核对单位与方法。仅用限定别名(不含裸 '肌钙蛋白')以免与 cTnI 混淆。

Dipstick urine protein (LOINC 20454-5, [Presence]/ordinal). Result is qualitative/semi-quantitative reported as -, ±, +, ++, +++ — no numeric unit, so canonical_unit is null and units is empty. Distinct from serum albumin (blood 'ALB').

Dipstick urine glucose (LOINC 25428-4, [Presence]/ordinal), reported -, ±, +, ++, +++ — qualitative, canonical_unit null. Deliberately does NOT carry bare 'GLU'/'葡萄糖'/'血糖'/'Glucose' to avoid colliding with the serum glucose entry.
Dipstick urine blood/hemoglobin (LOINC 5794-3, [Presence]/ordinal), reported -, ±, +, ++, +++ — qualitative, canonical_unit null.
Dipstick urine ketones (LOINC 2514-8, [Presence]/ordinal), reported -, ±, +, ++, +++ — qualitative, canonical_unit null.

Dipstick urine leukocyte esterase (LOINC 5799-2, [Presence]/ordinal), reported -, ±, +, ++, +++ — qualitative, canonical_unit null. Deliberately does NOT carry bare '白细胞'/'WBC' to avoid colliding with the blood WBC-count entry.
Dipstick urine nitrite (LOINC 5802-4, [Presence]/ordinal), reported - / + (negative/positive) — qualitative, canonical_unit null.
Numeric dipstick urine specific gravity (LOINC 5811-5), typically 1.005–1.030. Dimensionless ratio — canonical_unit '1' (UCUM dimensionless), identity row only; there is no alternate unit to convert.

Numeric dipstick urine pH (LOINC 5803-2), typically 4.5–8.0 on the pH scale. pH is a dimensionless logarithmic scale with no meaningful unit conversion, so canonical_unit is null and units is empty. Does NOT carry bare 'pH' (reserved/ambiguous) or '尿酸' (that is uric acid).
AFP tumor marker (LOINC 1834-1, [Mass/volume]). ug/L is identical to ng/mL (same number).
CEA tumor marker (LOINC 2039-6, [Mass/volume]). ug/L is identical to ng/mL (same number).
CA19-9 tumor marker (LOINC 24108-3, [Units/volume]). U/mL = kU/L (same number). Uses the numbered alias only — never bare 'CA' (collides with calcium/other CA markers).
CA125 tumor marker (LOINC 10334-1, [Units/volume]). U/mL = kU/L (same number). Uses the numbered alias only — never bare 'CA'.
CA15-3 tumor marker (LOINC 6875-9, [Units/volume]). U/mL = kU/L (same number). Uses the numbered alias only — never bare 'CA'.
Total PSA (LOINC 2857-1, [Mass/volume]). ug/L is identical to ng/mL (same number). This is total PSA, not free PSA (fPSA).
Total 25-hydroxyvitamin D (D2+D3) (LOINC 68438-1, [Moles/volume]). Canonical is SI nmol/L. ng/mL → nmol/L uses the well-established factor 2.496 (MW 400.64 g/mol; 1 ng/mL = 2.496 nmol/L).
Ferritin (LOINC 2276-4, [Mass/volume]). Canonical ug/L; ng/mL is numerically identical (1 ng/mL = 1 ug/L), so both rows are slope 1.
Serum iron (LOINC 14798-3, [Moles/volume]). Canonical is SI molar umol/L. ug/dL → umol/L uses the well-established factor 0.1791 (Fe MW 55.845; 1 ug/dL = 0.1791 umol/L).
Vitamin B12 / cobalamin (LOINC 14685-2, [Moles/volume]). Canonical is SI molar pmol/L. pg/mL → pmol/L uses the well-established factor 0.7378 (cyanocobalamin MW 1355.37; 1 pg/mL = 0.7378 pmol/L).
Serum folate (LOINC 14732-2, [Moles/volume]). Canonical is SI molar nmol/L. ng/mL → nmol/L uses the well-established factor 2.266 (folic acid MW 441.4; 1 ng/mL = 2.266 nmol/L).

Canonical LOINC 59408-5 is SpO2 by pulse oximetry (the value patients see on a finger oximeter). Arterial-blood-gas SaO2 (LOINC 2708-6) is included as an alias and folds here in V1; if the pulse-ox-vs-ABG distinction is needed later, split SaO2 to its own entry.

Canonical unit is degree Celsius (UCUM 'Cel'). The [degF] row is the exact affine Fahrenheit→Celsius conversion C = (5/9)(F−32) = 0.5555555556·F − 17.7777777778. Bare 'T' is intentionally NOT an alias (collides with thyroid T3/T4).
Chinese name 格列本脲 = glibenclamide (INN); the RxNorm Ingredient is coded under the US synonym 'glyburide' (RxCUI 4815, ATC A10BB01) — same substance.
ATC is G04CA03 (alpha-adrenoceptor antagonist, urologicals) — verified against the OMOP ATC vocab. NOT C02CA04, which the vocab assigns to doxazosin.

低分子肝素/LMWH is strictly the drug class (low-molecular-weight heparin), not a single substance; enoxaparin is the most common representative in Chinese practice, so these class terms are mapped here as aliases per the item scope. Other LMWHs (那屈肝素/达肝素) would also normalize here in V1 — split if that distinction is needed.
RxNorm ingredient name is the US spelling 'Torsemide' (concept 942350); Chinese/INN spelling is torasemide. ATC C03CA04.
Methimazole (RxNorm) and thiamazole (INN/ATC H03BB02) are the same substance.
